commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch sets Tart lease targets to use `SSHConfigProxy` and adds focused `prepareLease` coverage for the returned SSH target.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this review because the failure depends on a specific Apple Silicon Tart networking behavior. Source inspection does show current main can still take the raw Go TCP probe branch that the reporter isolated.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the current branch is a narrow candidate fix and the remaining action is maintainer review plus exact-head CI.

target.title: fix: use OpenSSH readiness for Tart leases
target.body:
## Summary

- Make Tart lease readiness use the OpenSSH/SSH-config path instead of the raw Go TCP pre-dial path.
- Preserve Tart port 22 behavior, empty fallback ports, per-lease key handling, and the existing `uname -s && test -d ~` ready check.
- Add focused prepareLease coverage for the readiness target construction.

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/644

## Validation

- `go test -race ./internal/providers/tart ./internal/cli` under the CI/default `022` umask
- `go build -trimpath -o bin/crabbox ./cmd/crabbox`
- Autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings, patch correct at 0.86 confidence
- `CRABBOX_LIVE=1 CRABBOX_LIVE_PROVIDERS=tart scripts/live-smoke.sh` attempted with Tart 2.32.1 on Apple Silicon

## Notes

Reported by @kmcquade in https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/644.

The live smoke exercised the new OpenSSH readiness branch, but this host could not route to the guest over its Tart bridge: both host `nc` and host OpenSSH returned `No route to host`. The guest itself was healthy, had SSH listening, and could reach the host. The guarded smoke timed out and verified complete cleanup: Tart inventory and Crabbox lease inventory were both empty afterward. This does not reproduce the reporter's narrower system-OpenSSH-succeeds/raw-Go-dial-fails condition, so the reporter's successful live workaround remains the direct behavioral proof.
target.author: app/clawsweeper
